ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disk_io" (
  "disk_io_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disk I/O metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that this disk I/O metric belongs to */,
  "all_io" REAL /* All I/O for the disk I/O metric */,
  "all_io_bytes" REAL /* All I/O bytes for the disk I/O metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disk_io_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disk_io_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "net_io" (
  "net_io_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network I/O metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that this network I/O metric belongs to */,
  "bytes" REAL /* Bytes for the network I/O metric */,
  "dropped" INTEGER /* Dropped packets for the network I/O metric */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Errors for the network I/O metric */,
  "packets" REAL /* Packets for the network I/O metric */,
  "rx_bytes" REAL /* Received bytes for the network I/O metric */,
  "rx_packets" REAL /* Received packets for the network I/O metric */,
  "tx_bytes" REAL /* Transmitted bytes for the network I/O metric */,
  "tx_packets" REAL /* Transmitted packets for the network I/O metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("net_io_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_net_io_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "general" (
  "general_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each general metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that this general metric belongs to */,
  "cpu" REAL /* CPU usage for the general metric */,
  "max_mem" REAL /* Maximum memory for the general metric */,
  "mem" REAL /* Memory usage for the general metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("general_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_general_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mem" (
  "mem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that this memory metric belongs to */,
  "available" REAL /* Available memory for the memory metric */,
  "percent" REAL /* Percentage of memory used for the memory metric */,
  "used" REAL /* Used memory for the memory metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mem_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "host" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injected" (
  "injected_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injected item */,
  "injected_name" TEXT /* Name of the injected item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injected_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layer" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vm" (
  "vm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual machine */,
  "vm_name" TEXT /* Name of the virtual machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the time interval */,
  "interval_length" INTEGER /* Length of the time interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., system administrator, developer, support) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric that this access log belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user that accessed the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
